description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case Dial style: White textured dial, steel colour markings, steel colour hands, branding near the 12 hour mark and 6 hour mark, date display near the 4 hour mark Strap style: Steel colour metal bracelet style strap with a double press release fold over closure Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time Water resistance: Up to 30 m Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
